boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; activation request and dependency closure diverge on environment and release condition.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: MATCH-PAX25-H06 requires exact bind of connector, account, closed_environment, closed_release_condition to requested values before queue release.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow source-record defect remains open: closed_environment and closed_release_condition fail to bind to requested values.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-PAX25-H06 closure time and values precede but do not match ACT-PAX25-H06 request; no authority to override.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show ACT-PAX25-H06 requests production remittance export environment and RC-3, but DEP-PAX25-H06 closes remittance validation readiness environment and VAL-REM-3. MATCH-PAX25-H06 mandates exact binding before queue release. Both environment and release condition diverge; no authority exists to override. Boundary remains open; escalate for defect resolution.
